message:
refactor(session): extract SQL builder helpers from flush execution and add dialect-aware identifier quoting

Factor FlushPlan::execute_insert_batch and execute_delete_batch into
separate build_insert_batch_sql() and build_delete_batch_sql() pure
functions that return (sql, params) without executing, making the SQL
generation testable in isolation.

Key improvements:
- Replace hardcoded quote_ident() calls with dialect.quote_identifier()
  so Postgres uses double-quotes and MySQL uses backticks correctly
- Replace hardcoded "$N" placeholders with dialect.placeholder(N) so
  SQLite gets "?N" and Postgres gets "$N" without branching at call sites
- Add validation: column/value length mismatch and inconsistent column
  lists across rows in the same insert batch now return typed errors
  instead of silently generating malformed SQL
- Delete batch builder validates PK column presence and returns None
  for empty PK sets (no safe WHERE clause) rather than generating
  DELETE without WHERE
- Extract duplicate SQL generation patterns into the builder functions
  to reduce the execute methods to pure coordination (build → execute →
  collect results)

Sync beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
